'''logagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:buccolingual|buccolingual]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:buccolingual|buccolingual]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| logagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:logagithi|logagithi]] || [[word:logagiji|logagiji]] || [[word:logagishi|logagishi]] || [[word:logagiki|logagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:logaguthuthu|logaguthuthu]] || [[word:logagujuju|logagujuju]] || [[word:logagushushu|logagushushu]] || [[word:logagukuku|logagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:logaguthu|logaguthu]] || [[word:logaguju|logaguju]] || [[word:logagushu|logagushu]] || [[word:logaguku|logaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:logagufthuf|logagufthuf]] || [[word:logagufjuf|logagufjuf]] || [[word:logagufshuf|logagufshuf]] || [[word:logagufkuf|logagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:logagethe|logagethe]] || [[word:logageje|logageje]] || [[word:logageshe|logageshe]] || [[word:logageke|logageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:logagothotho|logagothotho]] || [[word:logagojojo|logagojojo]] || [[word:logagoshosho|logagoshosho]] || [[word:logagokoko|logagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:logagotho|logagotho]] || [[word:logagojo|logagojo]] || [[word:logagosho|logagosho]] || [[word:logagoko|logagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:logagofthof|logagofthof]] || [[word:logagofjof|logagofjof]] || [[word:logagofshof|logagofshof]] || [[word:logagofkof|logagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:logagÃŸfthÃŸf|logagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfjÃŸf|logagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfshÃŸf|logagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfkÃŸf|logagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:logagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|logagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|logagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|logagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|logagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:logagÃŸfthÃŸf|logagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfjÃŸf|logagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfshÃŸf|logagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfkÃŸf|logagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:logagÃŸfthÃŸf|logagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfjÃŸf|logagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfshÃŸf|logagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:logagÃŸfkÃŸf|logagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:logagÃḊthÃḊ|logagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:logagÃḊjÃḊ|logagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:logagÃḊshÃḊ|logagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:logagÃḊkÃḊ|logagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:logagathatha|logagathatha]] || [[word:logagajaja|logagajaja]] || [[word:logagashasha|logagashasha]] || [[word:logagakaka|logagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:logagatha|logagatha]] || [[word:logagaja|logagaja]] || [[word:logagasha|logagasha]] || [[word:logagaka|logagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:logagafthaf|logagafthaf]] || [[word:logagafjaf|logagafjaf]] || [[word:logagafshaf|logagafshaf]] || [[word:logagafkaf|logagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:logagasha|logagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:logagshÃḋsha|logagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:logagrosha|logagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:logagmusha|logagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:logagyasha|logagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gologagnkshÃḋsha|gologagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gologagnkrosha|gologagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gologagnkmusha|gologagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gologagnkyasha|gologagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:logagagasha|logagagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:logagagshÃḋsha|logagagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:logagagrosha|logagagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:logagagmusha|logagagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:logagagyasha|logagagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gologagagnkshÃḋsha|gologagagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gologagagnkrosha|gologagagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gologagagnkmusha|gologagagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gologagagnkyasha|gologagagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:legÃḊgasha|legÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:legÃḊgshÃḋsha|legÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:legÃḊgrosha|legÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:legÃḊgmusha|legÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:legÃḊgyasha|legÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golegÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|golegÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golegÃḊgnkrosha|golegÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golegÃḊgnkmusha|golegÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golegÃḊgnkyasha|golegÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:logfagasha|logfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:logfagshÃḋsha|logfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:logfagrosha|logfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:logfagmusha|logfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:logfagyasha|logfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gologfagnkshÃḋsha|gologfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gologfagnkrosha|gologfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gologfagnkmusha|gologfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gologfagnkyasha|gologfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
